name: OpenCVE
author: Ali Bhutto
description: Enrich a CVE with OpenCVE data: CVSS metrics, CISA KEV status, EPSS score, CWE weaknesses and affected vendors/products.

configurationItems.name: token
configurationItems.description: OpenCVE organization API token (Bearer). Create one for free at app.opencve.io under your organization settings.

configurationItems.name: base_url
configurationItems.description: OpenCVE API base URL. Keep the default for the hosted instance, or set it to your self-hosted OpenCVE API.
